overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city district at night. The scene features elevated highways, glass skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath the elevated highway toward the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking past wooden barricade on the left

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with teal lighting underneath
tall curved glass building with illuminated interior floors
large vertical holographic advertisement with pink and yellow colors
construction barrier made of wooden pallets blocking off area
overhead directional signs with Japanese characters and arrows

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive elevated highway in a futuristic city at night. The area is semi-covered with teal neon lighting from above. To the right, a tall glass commercial tower rises with glowing windows, while wooden barricades line the left side of the path.

events.description: exits covered area beneath overpass into open intersection
crossing the street while futuristic vehicles pass by on the road

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning right to follow the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: zebra crossing stripes with red and white paint on the asphalt
illuminated pedestrian signal showing green walk symbol

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a wide-open intersection. The sky is visible above the neon-lit towers. The character crosses the street using the crosswalk while vehicles drive past, turning right toward the sidewalk. The glass commercial tower looms larger on the right as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and vending machines

events.description: steps onto sidewalk from the street crossing

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past storefronts and street vendors

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt leaning against building wall

entered.detail: bright red automated vending machine with illuminated product display
blue vending machine with yellow warning stripes at base
closed metal security shutters on ground floor commercial space

segments.scene_description: Now on the concrete sidewalk, the character walks past a series of vending machines and shuttered storefronts. The elevated highway is visible ahead in the distance. The street is lined with parked vehicles on the left, while pedestrians stroll along the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with multiple vending machines

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk passing more vending machines and neon signs

notable_agents.action: person in purple jacket and green pants standing near building entrance

entered.detail: yellow vending machine with blue accents and illuminated interface
circular holographic advertisement with rotating imagery

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds deeper into the commercial district where the street feels more enclosed between tall buildings. Multiple colorful vending machines line the right side of the walkway, while neon billboards and holographic advertisements illuminate the left. The elevated highway remains visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered shadows of an overpass into the vibrant, open heart of a neon-lit commercial district. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway bathed in teal light, moving past wooden barricades and a towering glass commercial building. As the character emerges from the overpass, the scene opens into a wide intersection under a night sky, where the camera follows the character across a crosswalk and toward the looming glass tower. The perspective then shifts to a concrete sidewalk, passing parked vehicles and shuttered storefronts while the highway recedes into the distance. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the camera proceeds deeper into the district, flanked by colorful vending machines on the right and glowing holographic advertisements on the left.
